exercises.name: SB bridge with DB crunch
exercises.description: Keep core activated. Pull DB over chest then release slowly back over head. The entire time keep core, glutes and hamstring activated.

exercises.name: SB bridges with ball or towel adduction
exercises.description: Squeeze a ball or towel or foam roller between knees. Bridge up engaging core and pulling stomach in tight. Bridge up for a count of 3 abs back down.

exercises.name: SB circles  out , clockwise, counter clockwise
exercises.description: This is not a full SB roll out. I want smaller rolls forward, clockwise and counterclockwise clockwise. Abs are engaged the entire time and stomach is pulled in tight. Take breaks if needed.

exercises.name: SB froggy 5 sec hold and release
exercises.description: Feet facing each other bridge up in a frog stance. Arms can go over head or by your sides. Flex up and hold for 5 sec count, release. Keep core tight & pulled in. KEGAL Almost as if you’re having to hold your breathe it’s pulled in so tight. After the 5 sec release abs breath in.

exercises.name: SB hamstring roll with glute raise
SB hamstring rolls with glute raises
SB PELVIC CRUNCH w/  3 count release
exercises.description: Support lower back with SB. Brace and keep core engaged (hold your pee feeling) crunch up and slowly release down for a count of 3. Repeat. If you need to adjust for more support roll forward a bit.

exercises.name: SB SL glute lift with knee tuck
SB straight DB arm pull overs
